title: Shape Tangram Tales
description: A shape composition game where kids place simple pieces on ghost outlines to build animals and objects.
learningGoals: Compose larger figures from smaller shapes
Practice spatial reasoning and part-whole thinking
Name basic shapes while building playful pictures
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap shape pieces onto ghost positions
feedbackModel: Correct shapes pop, sparkle, and speak the shape name; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished builds come to life with a spoken line.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder shape art only. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
